name: replace-xzdarcy-react-20260325-2054
idea: Replace @xzdarcy/react-timeline-editor entirely with a custom lightweight timeline renderer. The library bundles interact.js (~85KB minified) and we only use it for: time ruler rendering, row layout with virtualization, resize via interact.js, and cursor/playhead rendering. We've already reimplemented drag (useClipDrag), drop (useExternalDrop, useDragCoordinator), and cross-track moves ourselves. The goal is to eliminate the ~250KB minified dependency entirely and build a custom <TimelineCanvas> using our existing hooks + a simple pointer-event resize handler. Key files: src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx (main consumer), useClipDrag.ts, useClipResize.ts, useDragCoordinator.ts, useExternalDrop.ts, coordinate-utils.ts. The library provides: Timeline component from @xzdarcy/react-timeline-editor, TimelineAction/TimelineRow/TimelineState types from @xzdarcy/timeline-engine, CSS from @xzdarcy/react-timeline-editor/dist/react-timeline-editor.css.
